LMKRules.GeneralRules1: Legendary Monkey King is a 5-reel 4-row video slot featuring expanding reels and increasing multiplier.

GeneralRules2.value: The game is played with 20 base bet for %{1024} ways (may increase up to %{16807} ways), bet level of 1 to 10 and bet size of %{minChip} to %{maxChip}.
GeneralRules2.comment: %{minBetMtp}, %{maxBetMtp}, %{minChip}, %{maxChip} will be replaced with game specific configurations.
GeneralRules2.example: The game is played with 20 base bet for 64 ways - 46,656 ways, bet level of 1 to 10 and bet size of 0.01 to 10.

LMKRules.GeneralRules3: Free Spins Feature is played at the same bet size and bet level as the spin that triggered the Free Spins Feature.

LMKCommonRules.SymbolPrizeExplaination1: After the payout of every round is made, all winning symbols will explode allowing the symbols above them to cascade down for a new round.
LMKCommonRules.SymbolPrizeExplaination2: Additional winning combination will be tallied in every round until no more winning combination can be tallied.
LMKCommonRules.WildsExplaination1: Wild symbol substitutes for all symbols except Scatter symbol and Expanding Reel symbol.

LMKExpandingReelSymbol.Title: Expanding Reel Symbol
LMKExpandingReelSymbol.Explaination1: When one or more Expanding Reel symbol appears on any reels, a symbol (excluding Wild symbol and Scatter symbol) is added to the reels with the Expanding Reel symbol, which will also increase the number of ways to win.
LMKExpandingReelSymbol.Explaination2: Expanding Reel symbol will not appear in any reels that has 7 symbols.

LMKFreeSpinsFeature.Title: Free Spins Feature
LMKFreeSpinsFeature.Explaination1: 3 Scatter symbols appearing anywhere will trigger the Free Spins Feature with 8 free spins. Each additional Scatter symbol will trigger 2 more free spins.
LMKFreeSpinsFeature.Explaination2: At the start of the Free Spins Feature, the win multiplier is x1.
LMKFreeSpinsFeature.Explaination3: During any free spin, if there are one or more winning symbols on the reels, after wins are paid and the new symbols have cascaded down, the win multiplier will be increased by 1.
